title: SOE Dividend Remittance Policy
description: All profitable State Corporations to remit a minimum of 30% of net profit as dividend to the Consolidated Fund in accordance with the Public Finance Management Act 2012, Section 18

title: Mwongozo Code of Governance Compliance Certification
description: All State Corporations to submit annual Mwongozo Code compliance certificates to the State Corporations Advisory Committee (SCAC) by 31 March each year

title: SGR Freight Incentive Programme
description: Directive to KRC to implement freight incentive pricing to shift cargo from road to rail, targeting 30% increase in SGR freight volumes within 18 months

title: Electricity Tariff Adjustment Implementation
description: KPLC to implement approved 16% electricity tariff adjustment effective 1 January 2024, with lifeline tariff protection for consumers using below 50 kWh per month

title: Kenya Airways Restructuring Conditions
description: Kenya Airways to meet 12 operational and financial restructuring milestones as conditions for the KES 20 billion government recapitalisation, including route rationalisation and cost reduction targets

title: State Corporation Procurement Threshold Compliance
description: All State Corporations to comply with Public Procurement and Asset Disposal Act 2015 thresholds; contracts above KES 50 million require National Treasury concurrence
